name: refine-req
description: Refine existing requirements: Read current req → Identify gaps → Iterate with user → Update file

tasks.content: [REQ] Read existing requirements file and identify gaps
tasks.detail:
Search for <ip_name>/req/<ip_name>_requirements.md. Read it fully.
- [ ] List all sections present
- [ ] Mark each section as: Complete / Incomplete / Missing / TBD
- [ ] List all 'TBD' or placeholder values that need resolution
- [ ] Show the gap summary to the user before asking any questions
Gate: Gap analysis shown to user.

tasks.content: [REQ] Iterate with user to fill each gap
tasks.detail:
Work through each gap one at a time. For each:
- [ ] Present the current value (or 'missing')
- [ ] Ask the specific question needed to fill it
- [ ] Confirm the user's answer before moving to the next gap
- [ ] If user says 'keep TBD', mark it as intentional open item
Repeat until all resolvable gaps are filled.
Gate: No unintentional TBD values remain.

tasks.content: [REQ] Resolve open items and confirm changes
tasks.detail:
- [ ] Show a diff-style summary: what changed vs the current file
- [ ] List any remaining intentional open items
- [ ] Ask user: 'Confirm these changes?'
- [ ] Incorporate any final corrections
Gate: User has approved all changes.

- [ ] Update only the changed sections in <ip_name>/req/<ip_name>_requirements.md
- [ ] Preserve all confirmed sections verbatim
- [ ] Update Open Items section
- [ ] Output [REQ HANDOFF] → mas-gen if requirements are now complete
Gate: File updated. No regression in confirmed sections.
